callout.p: 源码校准补充（2026-06-04）：当前 Model Gateway 已有 bearer key、hash lookup、TPM/TPD 配额和 usage 记录，但还不是 AgentCore Gateway 那种企业 API 工具网关。另一个高优先级风险是默认 VolcoEngine API key 仍在源码常量中出现，应先收敛。

h3: 18.1 当前 Model Gateway 安全与配额时序
whiteboard: sequenceDiagram participant Client as Gateway Client participant API as /v1/gateway/chat/completions participant Store as SQLite Store participant Secret as Secret Store / Env participant Upstream as OpenAI-compatible Provider Client->>API: Authorization: Bearer lmap_... API->>API: hashGatewayKey(rawKey) API->>Store: getGatewayKeyByHash(hash) Store-->>API: gatewayKey or null API->>API: reject missing / invalid / disabled key API->>Store: getGatewayUsageSince(1 minute / 1 day) API->>API: enforceQuota(TPM / TPD) API->>Store: resolve model_config API->>Secret: read api_key_ref or env fallback API->>Upstream: POST /chat/completions with target.model Upstream-->>API: response + usage API->>Store: recordGatewayUsage(tokens, model) API-->>Client: upstream response

tr.td: 只存 hash 和 prefix；创建时只返回一次 raw key
估算 tokens 后按 TPM/TPD 拦截；成功后按 usage 或估算值记账
补 request count、cost、per-model quota、异常请求统计
用户配置 key 写入 secret ref；也支持 env fallback
默认模型 key 从源码移出，只允许 env/secret 注入
未实现；当前是模型代理网关
新增 OpenAPI/MCP/tool target、credential provider、tool policy、semantic tool catalog
